sections.headline: Fast, deep, and uncompromising.
sections.subheadline:
Blast freezing is the fastest way to lock in product quality: reducing core temperature rapidly to preserve texture, nutrition, and shelf life.
Crystal's blast freezing service is available at our facilities and as a portable solution at your location.

items.title: Facility-based blast freezing
items.description: Blast freezing at Crystal's cold storage facilities in Kolkata and Bhubaneswar. 10 MT/day capacity. FSSC 22000 compliant environment.

items.title: Portable blast freezer
items.description: Crystal's blast freezer containers can be deployed at your production facility. Down to -40°C. Plug-and-play. Operational within days, not months.

sections.body: Seafood · Meat & poultry · Ready meals · Dairy products · Fruits & vegetables · Bakery products · Processed foods
sections.cta_headline: Lock in quality at the source.
sections.cta_body: Crystal's blast freezing infrastructure, at our facilities or deployed at yours, gives your product the fastest possible path to frozen without sacrificing quality.
